creator: mel.xyzzy@rachie.is-a-geek.net
text:
Below is the verbose boot under 6.3-p1.

ACPI aml is at:
http://freebsd.pastebin.org/35656

There's a second bootable slice waiting to be formatted for 7-stable, if 
someone wants to pick it up. I don't know for how long the machine is 
available for non-production work.
